summary: 41+ analysts with Buy/Strong Buy consensus as of May 1, 2026. Last downgrade: DA Davidson cut PT from $300 to $175 on Feb 6, 2026. Post-Q1 beat upgrades: Robert W. Baird raised PT $285→$300 (Outperform); Oppenheimer raised PT $275→$320 (Outperform); Mizuho raised to Street-high $325 (Buy); BMO raised to $315; UBS raised to $304. Consensus PT $308.55.
